papers.title_en: Metaheuristic-driven feature selection in radiomics: improving time-to-event survival prediction in glioblastoma
papers.tldr: 胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）是极具侵略性的脑肿瘤，中位生存期短，准确预测生存期对治疗至关重要。本研究针对现有预后模型在特征选择上的不足，提出了一种基于元启发式算法驱动的影像组学特征选择方法。通过优化特征筛选过程，该方法显著提升了GBM患者生存时间的预测精度，为临床制定个性化治疗方案提供了更可靠的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Glioblastoma multiforme (GBM) is the most aggressive brain tumor with a mediansurvival under 15 months, making accurate survival prediction critical for treatmentplanning. Current prognostic models suffer from poor feature selection and limited …

papers.title_en: Assessing Robustness of Carotid Artery CT Angiography Radiomics in the Identification of Culprit versus Non-culprit lesions in Cerebrovascular Events
papers.tldr: 本研究评估了颈动脉CT血管造影（CTA）影像组学特征在区分脑血管事件中责任病变与非责任病变时的鲁棒性。随着影像组学从肿瘤学扩展至心血管领域，其特征的稳定性成为临床应用的关键。研究重点分析了定量特征在识别导致中风的症状性斑块中的表现，旨在提升颈动脉斑块风险评估的可靠性与临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Radiomics, the extraction of quantitative features from radiological images, isexpanding beyond oncology into cardiology for diagnosis, disease stratification andprognostication. Radiomic features are susceptible to variations due to differences in …

papers.title_en: MGK-RAG: Multi-Granularity Knowledge Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Radiology Report
papers.tldr: 本研究提出MGK-RAG框架，旨在解决放射科报告生成中现有RAG方法仅关注粗粒度图像-报告对应而忽略细粒度语义关系的问题。通过引入多粒度知识引导，该方法能够更精准地检索相关参考并生成事实准确性更高的报告，显著提升了医疗文本生成的临床价值。
papers.abstract_en: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is an effective approach to enhancing thefactual accuracy of radiology reports. However, existing methods primarily modelcoarse-grained image–report correspondences, ignoring semantic relations among …

papers.title_en: Semantic-Aware Data Imputation in Dynamic Relational Databases via Pre-trained Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对动态关系型数据库中的缺失值问题，提出了一种利用预训练语言模型（PLM）进行语义感知数据插补的方法。该方法通过捕捉数据间的深层语义关联，解决了传统插补技术在处理复杂上下文和动态更新时的局限性，显著提升了数据的完整性与可用性。
papers.abstract_en: Digital systems for information and representation management rely on databasearchitectures, whose effectiveness is undermined by the presence of missing values.Data Imputation (DI) is a well-known process that replaces missing values, usually …

papers.title_en: Multimodal Deep Learning for Pulmonary Nodule Detection on Chest Radiography in High‐Risk Adults, With Secondary Validation for All‐Cause and Cause‐Specific …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对高风险人群，开发了名为LungProNet的多模态深度学习模型。该模型通过融合胸部X光片（CXR）图像特征与年龄、性别、吸烟史等四项关键流行病学变量，不仅提升了肺结节的检测精度，还实现了对全因及特定原因死亡率的预后评估。研究证明了多模态数据融合在增强医学影像诊断准确性及预测患者长期生存风险方面的显著价值。
papers.abstract_en: Chest radiographs (CXRs) may encode prognostic signals beyond pulmonarynodule detection. We developed LungProNet, a multimodal deep‐learning (DL)model that fuses CXR features with four epidemiologic variables (age, sex, smoking …

papers.title_en: Preoperative Prediction of Persistent Type II Endoleaks After Endovascular Aortic Repair Using Multiregional Perianeurysmal Computed Tomography Angiography …
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在解决腹主动脉瘤腔内修复术（EVAR）后持续性II型内漏（T2EL）的预测难题。通过分析术前多区域瘤周CTA影像特征，研究团队开发了一种新型预测模型。该方法能够有效识别高风险患者，为临床制定个体化管理方案和优化术后随访策略提供了重要的影像学依据，具有较高的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Preoperative identification of patients with persistent type II endoleaks(T2ELs) after endovascular aortic repair (EVAR) for abdominal aortic aneurysm(AAA) could improve individualized management. Current approaches based on …

papers.title_en: A multimodal radiomics model to predict disease-free survival in resected non-small cell lung cancer: integrating clinicopathology, dual-energy CT, and deep learning …
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在提高非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）术后无病生存期（DFS）的预测精度。研究者开发了一种多模态放射组学模型，通过整合临床病理信息、双能CT（DECT）影像组学特征及深度学习特征进行综合评估。结果表明，该模型在预测DFS方面显著优于传统临床模型，为肺癌患者的术后风险分层和个性化治疗方案的制定提供了强有力的定量支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background: Predicting disease-free survival (DFS) after surgery for non-small celllung cancer (NSCLC) is crucial for personalized treatment decisions. However,traditional clinical models have limited predictive efficacy. Moreover, the combined …

papers.title_en: Is deep learning ready for abdominal organ-at-risk segmentation in the foundation model era: A comprehensive study of challenging clinical cases
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在基础模型时代，深度学习（DL）方法在处理复杂临床场景下腹部危及器官（OAR）分割任务的效能。通过评估最先进的全监督学习（FSL）方法，研究分析了现有模型在应对具有挑战性的临床案例时的准确性与可靠性，旨在填补该领域在复杂实际应用中的研究空白，为临床放射治疗规划提供重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose: The application of deep learning (DL)-based methods for accurate organ-at-risk (OAR) segmentation in challenging clinical scenarios remains unexplored. Thisstudy aims to evaluate state-of-the-art fully supervised learning (FSL) methods and …

papers.title_en: Exploiting Test-Time Augmentation in Federated Learning for Brain Tumor MRI Classification
papers.tldr: 本研究针对脑肿瘤MRI图像复杂且病变多变的诊断难题，探讨了在联邦学习（FL）框架下利用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行分类的方法。研究重点评估了测试时增强（TTA）技术在保护数据隐私的同时，如何提升模型在分布式环境下的泛化能力和诊断准确性。通过对比不同模型表现，证明了TTA能有效应对医学影像的变异性，为隐私保护下的高效脑肿瘤诊断提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Efficient brain tumor diagnosis is crucial for early treatment; however, it is challengingbecause of lesion variability and image complexity. We evaluated convolutionalneural networks (CNNs) in a federated learning (FL) setting, comparing models …

papers.title_en: Grounded Chess Reasoning in Language Models via Master Distillation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对语言模型在专业领域（如国际象棋）缺乏扎实推理能力的问题，提出了一种将专家系统知识蒸馏为自然语言思维链的通用框架。通过利用大师级国际象棋引擎的推理逻辑来训练模型，使其能够生成更准确的对局分析。该方法有效弥补了特定领域训练数据的不足，显著增强了模型在复杂逻辑任务中的表现，为提升大模型在专业领域的落地应用提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Language models often lack grounded reasoning capabilities in specializeddomains where training data is scarce but bespoke systems excel. We introduce ageneral framework for distilling expert system reasoning into natural language chain …

papers.title_en: ACPO: Counteracting Likelihood Displacement in Vision-Language Alignment with Asymmetric Constraints
papers.tldr: 针对大视觉语言模型（LVLM）在对齐过程中存在的“似然偏移”问题，即DPO导致模型对优选和拒绝回答的概率同时下降，本文提出了ACPO算法。该方法通过引入非对称约束，在提升优选回答概率的同时有效抑制拒绝回答，从而增强了模型在视觉问答和幻觉缓解等任务上的性能。
papers.abstract_en: While Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has become the de facto approach foraligning Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), it suffers from LikelihoodDisplacement, where the probability of both chosen and rejected responses …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对深度神经语言模型中语言表示学习难以准确追踪的长期难题，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪器。该方法旨在解决现有表示分析工具在效率与准确性之间的权衡困境，通过引入对抗性扰动机制，为理解和识别语言模型内部的语言表示提供了新的视角和高效的评估手段。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在图形用户界面（GUI）定位任务中应用离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLM）的潜力。长期以来，自回归模型在多模态理解和GUI定位中占据主导地位，但本文提出并验证了DVLM在处理GUI交互中的优势。通过将扩散模型引入GUI Agent开发，研究展示了其在精准定位和复杂界面理解上的卓越性能，为构建更高效的自动化GUI代理提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominatedmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding.Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在监督微调（SFT）过程中出现的“推理税”问题，即感知能力提升但推理能力下降的现象，提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合（Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation）方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度的处理逻辑，旨在微调过程中保留模型的逻辑推理能力，同时增强其视觉感知性能，为优化VLM的后训练过程提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在辅助科研构思时难以自动评估提案质量（如创新性和合理性）的问题，提出了一种学习预测与未来趋势对齐的科研提案的方法。该方法通过利用LLM预测未来研究方向，解决了大规模人工评估的局限性。研究证明，这种基于未来对齐的预测模型能更有效地衡量提案价值，为自动化科研评估和辅助决策提供了重要工具。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …

papers.title_en: Memory Dial: A Training Framework for Controllable Memorization in Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对语言模型记忆机制难以隔离和控制的挑战，本文提出 Memory Dial 训练框架。该框架改变了以往仅在训练后进行被动检测的局限，通过在训练阶段引入主动控制机制，实现了对模型记忆行为的精准管理。这一研究为解释模型预测逻辑提供了新工具，并为解决大模型中的隐私泄露和版权保护等关键问题提供了技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Memorization in language models is widely studied but remains difficult to isolateand control. Understanding when and what models memorize is essential forexplaining their predictions, yet existing approaches are post-hoc: they can detect …

papers.title_en: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散多模态大语言模型（dLLM）在视觉定位推理方面的不足，提出了“Thinking Diffusion”框架。该方法通过在扩散解码过程中引入惩罚与引导机制，优化了模型对视觉信息的理解与逻辑推理能力。研究证明，该方案能显著提升模型在复杂视觉任务中的表现，为非自回归多模态模型在处理视觉对齐和空间推理任务上提供了新的优化路径。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives toautoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodaltasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models …

papers.title_en: Faithful GRPO: Improving Visual Spatial Reasoning in Multimodal Language Models via Constrained Policy Optimization
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态推理模型在强化学习（RLVR）训练中虽提升了准确率但可能牺牲推理忠实性的问题，提出了 Faithful GRPO 方法。该方法通过约束策略优化，在增强视觉空间推理能力的同时，确保模型推理过程与视觉事实保持一致。实验表明，该方法在多个视觉推理基准测试中取得了显著进步，为构建更准确且可靠的多模态模型提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal reasoning models (MRMs) trained with reinforcement learning withverifiable rewards (RLVR) show improved accuracy on visual reasoningbenchmarks. However, we observe that accuracy gains often come at the cost of …
